---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or next module
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

What should this feature help users do?

## User Role

Who needs it?

- Admin
- Sales
- Sales Manager
- Finance

## Proposed Flow

Describe the expected workflow.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The feature is role-protected where needed.
- [ ] The feature has validation for risky inputs.
- [ ] The feature has focused tests.
- [ ] The feature is documented if it affects demo usage.

## Notes

Add references, screenshots, or edge cases.
